echodeps 1.0.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • My packages
  • Changelog

Getting Started


Author: Brian M. Schilder


Updated: Mar-14-2026

Source: vignettes/echodeps.Rmd
echodeps.Rmd
library(echodeps)

Gather package metadata

echoverse

package_metadata pulls metadata from the DESCRIPTION files from a package (or list of packages) and organizes them into a convenient table.

Metadata for the echoverse suite of R packages will be retrieved by default. While echoverse itself is not the name of an R package, package_metadata will automatically recognise this special command and retrieve all packages that are part of this suite.

meta_echoverse <- echodeps::package_metadata(pkgs = "echoverse")
## Adding all echoverse modules to metadata search.
## Collecting metadata for 14 packages
knitr::kable(meta_echoverse)
package owner repo authors github_url package Type Title Version Date Authors@R Description License URL BugReports Encoding Depends biocViews Imports Suggests Remotes RoxygenNote VignetteBuilder Config/testthat/edition RemoteType RemoteHost RemoteRepo RemoteUsername RemoteRef RemoteSha GithubRepo GithubUsername GithubRef GithubSHA1 NeedsCompilation Packaged Author Maintainer Built LazyData SystemRequirements StagedInstall Config/reticulate owner_repo ref
catalogueR RajLabMSSM catalogueR Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/catalogueR catalogueR Package QTL Data Extraction and Colocalization 2.0.1 2026-03-08 Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj Rapid querying, colocalization, and plotting of summary stats from the eQTL Catalogue https://www.ebi.ac.uk/eqtl/. eQTL Catalogue currently contains >100 datasets from 20 different studies (including GTEx), across many tissues/cell types/conditions. GPL-3 https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/catalogueR https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/catalogueR/issues UTF-8 R (>= 4.1) echodata, echotabix, dplyr, tidyr, data.table, piggyback, parallel, ggplot2, ggrepel, patchwork, scales, jsonlite, coloc, AnnotationDbi, EnsDb.Hsapiens.v75, GenomicRanges, downloadR echoLD, markdown, rmarkdown, magick, methods, devtools, badger, BiocStyle, knitr, testthat (>= 3.0.0) github::RajLabMSSM/echotabix, github::RajLabMSSM/echodata, github::RajLabMSSM/echoLD, github::RajLabMSSM/downloadR 7.3.3 knitr 3 github api.github.com catalogueR RajLabMSSM HEAD d7b712644f51825165086abc2a0613a9618398ba catalogueR RajLabMSSM HEAD d7b712644f51825165086abc2a0613a9618398ba no 2026-03-14 17:37:28 UTC; root Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj Brian Schilder brian_schilder@alumni.brown.edu R 4.6.0; ; 2026-03-14 17:37:28 UTC; unix true NA NA NA RajLabMSSM/catalogueR RajLabMSSM/catalogueR

echotabix RajLabMSSM echotabix Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/echotabix echotabix Package Echoverse Module: Automated Creation and Querying of Tabix Files 1.0.1 2026-03-08 Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj Converts genomic data files to tabix format (including liftover, sorting, compression, and indexing steps) with a single function. Retrieves local or remote tabix VCF/tabular files with helper functions for creating queries from subsets of genomic data (e.g GWAS/QTL loci, genomic ranges). Multiple methods available at each step, including wrapper functions for an up-to-date, conda-based installation of htslib tools. GPL (>= 3) https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/echotabix https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/echotabix/issues UTF-8 R (>= 4.1) echodata, echoconda, utils, R.utils, tools, dplyr, methods, data.table, GenomeInfoDb, IRanges, GenomicRanges, Biostrings, VariantAnnotation, Rsamtools, rtracklayer, MungeSumstats (>= 1.3.14), BiocManager, BiocGenerics markdown, rmarkdown, knitr, BiocStyle, covr, testthat (>= 3.0.0), remotes, parallel, badger, seqminer, GenomicFiles github::RajLabMSSM/echodata, github::RajLabMSSM/echoconda 7.3.3 knitr 3 github api.github.com echotabix RajLabMSSM HEAD 16b5eae83572e87af7cfd19fd19240fbe5536be5 echotabix RajLabMSSM HEAD 16b5eae83572e87af7cfd19fd19240fbe5536be5 no 2026-03-14 17:34:00 UTC; root Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj Brian Schilder brian_schilder@alumni.brown.edu R 4.6.0; ; 2026-03-14 17:34:01 UTC; unix NA Python (>= 3.7.0) NA NA RajLabMSSM/echotabix RajLabMSSM/echotabix

dplyr

You can use the same function to find

meta <- echodeps::package_metadata(pkgs = c("dplyr","data.table","igraph"))
## Collecting metadata for 3 packages
knitr::kable(meta)
package owner repo authors github_url Type package Title Version Authors@R Description License URL BugReports Depends Imports Suggests VignetteBuilder Config/build/compilation-database Config/Needs/website Config/testthat/edition Encoding LazyData RoxygenNote NeedsCompilation Packaged Author Maintainer Repository Date/Publication Built ByteCompile Enhances LinkingTo Config/build/never-clean Config/comment/compilation-database Config/Needs/build Config/Needs/coverage Config/testthat/parallel Config/testthat/start-first SystemRequirements owner_repo ref
data.table Rdatatable data.table Tyson Barrett, Matt Dowle, Arun Srinivasan, Jan Gorecki, Michael Chirico, Toby Hocking, Benjamin Schwendinger, Ivan Krylov, Pasha Stetsenko, Tom Short, Steve Lianoglou, Eduard Antonyan, Markus Bonsch, Hugh Parsonage, Scott Ritchie, Kun Ren, Xianying Tan, Rick Saporta, Otto Seiskari, Xianghui Dong, Michel Lang, Watal Iwasaki, Seth Wenchel, Karl Broman, Shilon, Vadim Khotilovich, Hadley Wickham, Bennet Becker, Kyle Haynes, Boniface Christian Kamgang, Olivier Delmarcell, Josh O’Brien, Dereck de Mezquita, Michael Czekanski, Dmitry Shemetov, Nitish Jha, Joshua Wu, Iago Giné-Vázquez, Anirban Chetia, Doris Amoakohene, Angel Feliz, Michael Young, Mark Seeto, Philippe Grosjean, Vincent Runge, Christian Wia, Elise Maigné, Vincent Rocher, Vijay Lulla, Aljaž Sluga, Bill Evans, Reino Bruner, @badasahog, Vinit Thakur, Mukul Kumar, Ildikó Czeller, Manmita Das Fast aggregation of large data (e.g. 100GB in RAM), fast ordered joins, fast add/modify/delete of columns by group using no copies at all, list columns, friendly and fast character-separated-value read/write. Offers a natural and flexible syntax, for faster development. MPL-2.0 | file LICENSE https://r-datatable.com, https://Rdatatable.gitlab.io/data.table, https://github.com/Rdatatable/data.table https://github.com/Rdatatable/data.table/issues R (>= 3.4.0) methods bit64 (>= 4.0.0), bit (>= 4.0.4), R.utils (>= 2.13.0), xts, zoo (>= 1.8-1), yaml, knitr, markdown knitr NA NA NA UTF-8 NA NA yes 2026-01-25 04:12:25 UTC; tysonbarrett Tyson Barrett, Matt Dowle, Arun Srinivasan, Jan Gorecki, Michael Chirico, Toby Hocking, Benjamin Schwendinger, Ivan Krylov, Pasha Stetsenko, Tom Short, Steve Lianoglou, Eduard Antonyan, Markus Bonsch, Hugh Parsonage, Scott Ritchie, Kun Ren, Xianying Tan, Rick Saporta, Otto Seiskari, Xianghui Dong, Michel Lang, Watal Iwasaki, Seth Wenchel, Karl Broman, Tobias Schmidt, David Arenburg, Ethan Smith, Francois Cocquemas, Matthieu Gomez, Philippe Chataignon, Nello Blaser, Dmitry Selivanov, Andrey Riabushenko, Cheng Lee, Declan Groves, Daniel Possenriede, Felipe Parages, Denes Toth, Mus Yaramaz-David, Ayappan Perumal, James Sams, Martin Morgan, Michael Quinn, @javrucebo, Marc Halperin, Roy Storey, Manish Saraswat, Morgan Jacob, Michael Schubmehl, Davis Vaughan, Leonardo Silvestri, Jim Hester, Anthony Damico, Sebastian Freundt, David Simons, Elliott Sales de Andrade, Cole Miller, Jens Peder Meldgaard, Vaclav Tlapak, Kevin Ushey, Dirk Eddelbuettel, Tony Fischetti, Ofek Shilon, Vadim Khotilovich, Hadley Wickham, Bennet Becker, Kyle Haynes, Boniface Christian Kamgang, Olivier Delmarcell, Josh O’Brien, Dereck de Mezquita, Michael Czekanski, Dmitry Shemetov, Nitish Jha, Joshua Wu, Iago Giné-Vázquez, Anirban Chetia, Doris Amoakohene, Angel Feliz, Michael Young, Mark Seeto, Philippe Grosjean, Vincent Runge, Christian Wia, Elise Maigné, Vincent Rocher, Vijay Lulla, Aljaž Sluga, Bill Evans, Reino Bruner, @badasahog, Vinit Thakur, Mukul Kumar, Ildikó Czeller, Manmita Das Tyson Barrett t.barrett88@gmail.com CRAN 2026-01-27 11:40:15 UTC R 4.6.0; dplyr tidyverse dplyr Hadley Wickham, Romain François, Lionel Henry, Kirill Müller, Davis Vaughan, Posit Software, PBC https://github.com/tidyverse/dplyr Package dplyr A Grammar of Data Manipulation 1.2.0 Hadley Wickham, Romain François, Lionel Henry, Kirill Müller, Davis Vaughan, Posit Software, PBC A fast, consistent tool for working with data frame like objects, both in memory and out of memory. MIT + file LICENSE https://dplyr.tidyverse.org, https://github.com/tidyverse/dplyr https://github.com/tidyverse/dplyr/issues R (>= 4.1.0) cli (>= 3.6.2), generics, glue (>= 1.3.2), lifecycle (>= 1.0.5), magrittr (>= 1.5), methods, pillar (>= 1.9.0), R6, rlang (>= 1.1.7), tibble (>= 3.2.0), tidyselect (>= 1.2.0), utils, vctrs (>= 0.7.1) broom, covr, DBI, dbplyr (>= 2.2.1), ggplot2, knitr, Lahman, lobstr, nycflights13, purrr, rmarkdown, RSQLite, stringi (>= 1.7.6), testthat (>= 3.1.5), tidyr (>= 1.3.0), withr knitr true tidyverse/tidytemplate 3 UTF-8 true 7.3.3 yes 2026-01-30 23:05:30 UTC; hadleywickham Hadley Wickham, Romain François, Lionel Henry, Kirill Müller, Davis Vaughan, Posit Software, PBC Hadley Wickham hadley@posit.co CRAN 2026-02-03 08:50:47 UTC R 4.6.0; x86_64-pc-linux-gnu; 2026-02-11 19:53:08 UTC; unix NA NA NA NA NA NA NA NA NA NA tidyverse/dplyr tidyverse/dplyr
igraph igraph rigraph Gábor Csárdi, Tamás Nepusz, Vincent Traag, Szabolcs Horvát, Fabio Zanini, Daniel Noom, Kirill Müller, Michael Antonov, Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, David Schoch, Maëlle Salmon https://github.com/igraph/rigraph NA igraph Network Analysis and Visualization 2.2.2 Gábor Csárdi, Tamás Nepusz, Vincent Traag, Szabolcs Horvát, Fabio Zanini, Daniel Noom, Kirill Müller, Michael Antonov, Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, David Schoch, Maëlle Salmon Routines for simple graphs and network analysis. It can handle large graphs very well and provides functions for generating random and regular graphs, graph visualization, centrality methods and much more. GPL (>= 2) https://r.igraph.org/, https://igraph.org/, https://igraph.discourse.group/ https://github.com/igraph/rigraph/issues methods, R (>= 3.5.0) cli, graphics, grDevices, lifecycle, magrittr, Matrix, pkgconfig (>= 2.0.0), rlang (>= 1.1.0), stats, utils, vctrs ape (>= 5.7-0.1), callr, decor, digest, igraphdata, knitr, rgl (>= 1.3.14), rmarkdown, scales, stats4, tcltk, testthat, vdiffr, withr knitr false here, readr, tibble, xmlparsedata, xml2 3 UTF-8 NA 7.3.3.9000 yes 2026-02-12 09:58:29 UTC; kirill Gábor Csárdi, Tamás Nepusz, Vincent Traag, Szabolcs Horvát, Fabio Zanini, Daniel Noom, Kirill Müller, Michael Antonov, Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, David Schoch, Maëlle Salmon Kirill Müller kirill@cynkra.com CRAN 2026-02-12 14:00:12 UTC R 4.6.0; x86_64-pc-linux-gnu; 2026-03-14 17:39:57 UTC; unix NA graph cpp11 (>= 0.5.0) true Generate manually with pkgload:::generate_db() for faster pkgload::load_all() r-lib/roxygen2, devtools, irlba, pkgconfig, igraph/igraph.r2cdocs, moodymudskipper/devtag covr true aaa-auto, vs-es, scan, vs-operators, weakref, watts.strogatz.game libxml2 (optional), glpk (>= 4.57, optional) igraph/rigraph igraph/rigraph

Create a dependency graph

dep_graph builds upon the above functions and create a dependency graph for all the dependencies of a given R package (or a selected subset of its dependencies).

Metadata for each package is automatically extracted and shown as tooltips that appear when you hover over the respective node.

All of the plots, graphs, metadata, and saved file paths generated by dep_graphare returned to the user as a named list in case they would like to explore them further.

echolocatoR 

res_echoverse <- echodeps:: dep_graph(pkg = "echolocatoR",
                                     ## Setting show_plot for vignette purposes
                                     show_plot = list(r=TRUE,
                                                      browser=FALSE))

dplyr 

res <- echodeps::dep_graph(pkg = "dplyr",
                           shape = "hexagon", 
                           layout = function(graph, pkg){
                               visNetwork::visIgraphLayout(
                                   graph = graph,
                                   layout = "layout_nicely"
                               )
                           }
                           )

Session Info 

utils::sessionInfo()
## R Under development (unstable) (2026-03-12 r89607)
## Platform: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
## Running under: Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS
## 
## Matrix products: default
## BLAS:   /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openblas-pthread/libblas.so.3 
## LAPACK: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openblas-pthread/libopenblasp-r0.3.26.so;  LAPACK version 3.12.0
## 
## locale:
##  [1] LC_CTYPE=en_US.UTF-8       LC_NUMERIC=C              
##  [3] LC_TIME=en_US.UTF-8        LC_COLLATE=en_US.UTF-8

## attached base packages:

## other attached packages:
